login_desc:
You are connecting your wallet and signing one message to login to Ebunker.io.
This is not a transaction and will not be broadcast or use/cost your fund. :)
import_key_warning: For security reasons, all uploaded files will be encrypted, so uploading will take time, please be patient!
enter_pass: Please enter the keystore password below
keys_info_2: and corresponding number of keystore files(keystore-xx.json)
description: A non-custodial open-source Ethereum staking pool.
feature_desc_1: Private keys are kept by users. Ebunker only perform validator attestation and does not handle funds.
feature_desc_2: With 24*7 node monitoring, Ebunker validators maintain a top ranking for Effectiveness. MEV-Boost infrastructure is implemented to support MEV extraction for higher yields.
feature_desc_3: Ebunker charges 0 fees for node operating and 0% rewards sharing for the consensus layer. Partial executive layer rewards will be charged.
feature_desc_4: Ebunker has a backup and disaster recovery system. All codes are open-source and audited by the best in the crypto security industry.
feature_desc_6: Crypto's always on, and so is your reward stream.
stay_updated_desc: Get the latest information to your inbox.
index_apr_desc: Calculated based on the past 7 days
faq_title_1: 1. What is non-custodial ETH Staking service?
faq_desc_1: The ETH Staking service provided by Ebunker is non-custodial. What we have is the signature key of the validator nodes, instead of the mnemonic phrase, nor the user's assets. With this signature Key (Keystore), all we can do is packaging and signing the transactions for you. Therefore, unlike centralized exchanges or other DeFi projects, Ebunker can ensure the security of your staking assets.
faq_title_2: 2. Can I withdraw my staked ETH?
faq_desc_2: you can apply to withdraw your ETH from the Ethereum Beacon network at any time. The withdrawal time depends on the network queue, usually taking 0-2 days. You can check here: https://www.validatorqueue.com/
faq_title_3: 3. Where will I receive my staked ETH after withdrawal?
faq_desc_3: When using tools such as Wagyu to generate Keystore, you can set the asset withdrawal address. Once the withdrawal address A is set, the staked assets and the consensus rewards will be transferred to this address when you withdraw. If this address is not set, the default address will be the same as the address used to set up the mnemonic phrase.
faq_title_4: 4. Why should I safely keep the mnemonic phrase?
faq_desc_4: The mnemonic phrase is the only way to generate the validator’s signature Key (Keystore) and withdrawal key. Once lost, the withdrawal key cannot be generated, hence the assets cannot be withdrawn. In addition, when generating the signature Key (Keystore), the default withdrawal address is the one used to set up the mnemonic phrase. When withdrawn, the staked assets and the consensus rewards will be sent to the default address. If the mnemonic phrase is leaked, the malicious hacker can use it to regenerate the signature Key and cause validators to be punished, resulting in the loss of staked assets. Therefore, it is very important to keep the mnemonic phrase safe.
faq_title_5: 5. What are the components of the staking rewards?
faq_title_6: 6. How can I receive my real-time staking rewards?
faq_title_7: 7. Will the staked ETH be at any risk ?
faq_title_8: 8. Under what circumstances will validators be penalized?
faq_title_9: 9. Why join the Ebunker staking pool?
faq_title_10: 10. Why is it recommended to use the Ebunker batch staking contract?
faq_title_11: 11. Is the Ebunker batch staking contract safe?
faq_title_12: 12. How long does it take to queue for staking ETH?

generate_create_desc_1: 1. Ebunker will generate new mnemonic phrases for your node and create a set of validator node keys.
generate_create_desc_2: 2. It is very important to create backups for your phrases and keep them secure and private at all times, otherwise there would be no way of retrieving your assets.
generate_create_desc_3: 3. Ebunker will not keep or leak your node mnemonic phrases. All codes are open sourced and audited by industry-leaders in blockchain security.
generate_create_desc_4: 4. For security reasons, it is recommended that you disconnect from the Internet before proceeding to the next step. You can reconnect to the Internet when notified.
create_mnemonic_notice: Please keep your mnemonic phrases carefully to ensure the safety of your assets.
create_mnemonic_desc_1: Please record the mnemonic phrase below.
create_mnemonic_desc_1_2: Please confirm twice to record the mnemonic phrase
create_mnemonic_desc_2: Mnemonic phrases are required to withdraw your staked ETH, please create backups and keep them safely.
verify_mnemonic_desc_2: Please retype your mnemonic phrase below. This section does not provide a paste function to ensure that you have correctly saved the complete mnemonic phrase.
import_mnemonic_notice: Please be sure to keep your mnemonic phrase, once lost, your assets will not be withdrawn!
import_mnemonic_desc_1: Please record the vocabulary below In order to avoid data leakage, please do not save the mnemonic phrase by screenshot or copy. It is recommended that you write the mnemonic phrase and keep it properly.
recommended_node_number: Recommended number of validators to be created
create_node_notice: Setting up in progress, please do not close the current page
deposit_desc_1: 1. I acknowledge that Ebunker uses the encapsulated contract for batch staking, which calls the official ETH staking contract. All codes have been audited by third parties in blockchain security.
deposit_desc_2: 2. I acknowledge that the ETH staking is irrevocable. Once staked, ETH will be deposited into the staking contract. It cannot be transferred or used for other purposes.
deposit_desc_3: 3. I have safely kept and backed up the mnemonic phrase to ensure that it will not be leaked or lost.
deposit_desc_4: 4. I acknowledge that the mnemonic phrase is required to claim the staked ETH and consensus rewards.
deposit_desc_5: 5. I acknowledge that there is a risk of getting slashed due to poor node operation and maintenance, and part of the staked ETH could be burned for penalty.
deposit_desc_6: 6. I acknowledge that Ebunker team will run the ETH validator nodes on my behalf.
deposit_desc_7: As you haven't uploaded the Deposit_data, you won't be able to utilize the <Ebunker Batch Stake> feature. Kindly consult the Guide and use <ETH Official Stake> instead.
faq_title: We hope these answers could help you.

referral_desc: Share your invitation code and invite your friends to Ebunker Pledge to receive Ethereum rewards!

referral_step_2_desc: Invite friends to access Ebunker and stake ETH to run at least 1 validator.

update_el_address_tip: This address is used to claim your validator rewards from the execution layer. Please confirm that the wallet address is correct.
sign_message_tip: For the safety of your assets, modifying the wallet address to receive rewards from execution layer requires you to use the login wallet for signature verification. The system will connect to your wallet and sign it. This is not a transaction, and it will not be broadcast. Your funds will not be used or consumed.
el_address_error: The address format is wrong, please check and confirm the address you entered!
claim_address_intro: The execution layer reward address can be modified at the wallet connection in the upper right corner.
exit_warning_tip_1: Please note: When your node exits the consensus, your funds will be returned after the queue is finished, and the node will not be able to rejoin the consensus.
exit_warning_tip_2: - Based on Ethereum specifications, during the exit queue process, you will still earn rewards, and the duration of the queue depends on the current number of exiting nodes.
exit_warning_tip_3: - Based on Ethereum specifications, after the exit queue is completed, it will still take a short time for the funds to be returned. The waiting time depends on the scanning progress of the ETH consensus rewards. Once the scanning is complete, your funds will be automatically sent back to the withdrawal address you previously provided.

compounding_staking_desc: Rewards automatically compound by increasing the validator balance over time.

users_content_1: User-friendly Experience for Quick Staking Process
users_content_2: Non-custodial Solution for Most Safety(Steer clear of/Hands off user's private keys)
diversity_content_1: We embrace diverse setups by supporting public clouds, bare metals, miniPCs, and custom nodes.
diversity_title_2: Championing robustness with Multi choices of Clients
diversity_content_2: We support a wide range of Ethereum clients, including Geth, Besu for EL and Prysm, Lighthouse, and Teku for CL.
diversity_title_3: Rooted in Hong Kong, serving Asia-Pacific
diversity_content_3: Our base in Hong Kong enables us to effectively cater to the Asia-Pacific region.
diversity_title_4: Ethereum as a True Global Infrastructure
diversity_content_4: We aim to contribute to the Ethereum network becoming a genuinely global infrastructure.
